about.title: About Embroidera
about.intro: Welcome to Embroidera — where tradition meets modern creativity.
about.story_text: Embroidera was born from a deep passion for the timeless art of embroidery. What started as a personal hobby has grown into a brand dedicated to preserving and reinventing this beautiful craft. Every piece we create carries the warmth of handwork, the precision of tradition, and a touch of contemporary design.
about.mission_text: We believe handcraft connects people. Through our workshops, we share the joy of creating with your hands. Through our products, we bring unique, meaningful art into everyday life.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, want to commission a piece, or interested in a workshop? We'd love to hear from you.
